description_long: This is a classic double-barreled shotgun with a break-action mechanism, featuring a long, blued steel barrel and a polished wooden stock. The stock is ergonomically shaped with a smooth, slightly curved butt and a checkered grip area for better handling. The receiver and trigger guard are made of metal, with visible hammers and triggers, indicating a traditional side-by-side firing mechanism. The fore-end is also wooden, matching the stock, and is attached beneath the barrels. The barrels are parallel and extend well beyond the fore-end, giving the firearm a balanced and elongated profile. The overall finish is a combination of dark metal and rich brown wood, with minimal embellishments, emphasizing functionality and durability.
description: A traditional double-barreled shotgun with a polished wooden stock and long, blued steel barrels. The firearm features a break-action design and classic side-by-side configuration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the double barrels, wooden stock, and break-action receiver.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the slim profile of the barrels and the width of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, and the length of the barrels.
description_view_3: Barrel-end view emphasizing the twin barrels and the symmetry of the shotgun's design.
